cannot_assert: The arrows do not encode pseudotime, lineage, velocity, transition probability, or causality.
confirmed: Arrow geometry is an annotation overlay on the same Seurat UMAP coordinates and is explicitly labelled as non-trajectory.
interpretable: Arrowheads, labels, and the annotation-only disclaimer remain readable.
recommendation: Keep for explanatory layouts only when the non-trajectory disclaimer is retained.
visible: All nine groups, directed annotation arrows, legend, and disclaimer are visible without clipping.
